title: Determine Hospital Station Status From Stacklight Indication
summary: Use the documented hospital station stacklight colors and flashing patterns to determine the current station status or condition.
when_to_use: Use this reference procedure when an operator needs to identify the documented meaning of a hospital station stacklight indication, including station status, AGV presence, fault indication, or RMS error.
not_for: Do not use this source to determine corrective or recovery actions.
Do not use this source to interpret stacklight patterns that do not match one of the documented indications.

responsibilities: Visually inspect the hospital station stacklight.
Compare the observed indication to the documented meanings only.
Record or communicate the documented status meaning.

safety_notes: This source supports status interpretation only.
Do not infer corrective actions from this source section because it provides status meanings only.
access_or_tools_needed: Visual access to the hospital station stacklight
Documented hospital station stacklight status mapping

access_required: Visual access to the hospital station stacklight
system_preconditions: A hospital station stacklight is present and visible for observation.
external_references: OptiSweep Operation and Maintenance Manual, section 3.3.1 Hospital Station Stacklight, including Figure 3-5 and Figure 3-6.

visual_references.description: Hospital station photo used to identify the station and associated stacklight.
Stacklight photo and documented indication reference for interpreting illuminated sections and flashing patterns.

steps.title: Locate the hospital station and its stacklight
steps.purpose: Identify the correct physical station and the single stacklight associated with it before interpreting status.
steps.instruction: Go to the hospital station and identify its single stacklight.
steps.expected_result: The hospital station and its associated stacklight are visually identified.
steps.healthy_condition: A single stacklight is present at the hospital station and can be visually inspected.
steps.failure_condition: The stacklight cannot be located, is not visible, or the station cannot be confidently identified.

actions.label: Identify hospital station
actions.exact_action: Locate the hospital station and identify its single stacklight.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall hospital station appearance and the associated stacklight location.
The stacklight assembly associated with the hospital station.

stop_or_escalate_if: The hospital station or its stacklight cannot be positively identified.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Each hospital station has one stacklight that illuminates in sections to give information about actions at the station.

steps.title: Observe illuminated sections and flashing behavior
steps.purpose: Capture the exact visible stacklight state needed for interpretation.
steps.instruction: Observe which stacklight section or sections are illuminated and whether the indication is solid or flashing.
steps.expected_result: The observed stacklight pattern is identified by color combination and whether it is solid or flashing.
steps.healthy_condition: The illuminated section or sections and flashing behavior can be clearly observed.
steps.failure_condition: The indication cannot be clearly observed or the flashing/solid state cannot be determined.

actions.label: Observe stacklight state
actions.exact_action: Observe which stacklight section or sections are illuminated and whether the indication is solid or flashing.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Which color sections are illuminated and whether the indication appears solid or flashing.

stop_or_escalate_if: The stacklight indication cannot be clearly observed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Each hospital station has one stacklight that illuminates in sections to give information about actions at the station.

Solid Red: Default/Indeterminate. Solid Green: No AGV present at the station. Red, Yellow, Green: RMS error. Flashing Red: Fault. Flashing Yellow for 15 seconds: AGV is present at either position of the station.

steps.title: Match the observed pattern to the documented meaning
steps.purpose: Translate the observed stacklight state into the documented station condition.
steps.instruction: Compare the observed indication to the documented meanings: solid red = default or indeterminate; solid green = no AGV present at the station; red, yellow, and green illuminated = RMS error; flashing red = fault; flashing yellow for 15 seconds = AGV present at either position of the station.
steps.expected_result: A documented status meaning is assigned to the observed stacklight pattern.
steps.healthy_condition: The observed pattern matches one of the documented indications exactly.
steps.failure_condition: The observed pattern does not match one of the documented indications.

actions.label: Interpret stacklight pattern
actions.exact_action: Compare the observed indication to the documented meanings: solid red = default or indeterminate; solid green = no AGV present at the station; red, yellow, and green illuminated = RMS error; flashing red = fault; flashing yellow for 15 seconds = AGV present at either position of the station.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Documented color and flashing pattern meanings for the hospital station stacklight.

stop_or_escalate_if: The observed stacklight pattern does not match one of the documented indications.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Solid Red: Default/Indeterminate. Solid Green: No AGV present at the station. Red, Yellow, Green: RMS error. Flashing Red: Fault. Flashing Yellow for 15 seconds: AGV is present at either position of the station.
Red, Yellow, Green: RMS error. Flashing Red: Fault.
Solid Green: No AGV present at the station. Flashing Yellow for 15 seconds: AGV is present at either position of the station.

steps.title: Record or communicate the documented status meaning
steps.purpose: Ensure the observed and interpreted station condition is communicated without adding unsupported conclusions.
steps.instruction: Record or communicate the documented status meaning based only on the observed stacklight pattern.
steps.expected_result: The station status is recorded or communicated using the documented meaning only.
steps.healthy_condition: The communicated status matches the documented indication and does not include unsupported corrective guidance.
steps.failure_condition: The status is not recorded, is communicated inaccurately, or includes inferred corrective actions not supported by this source.

actions.label: Communicate status meaning
actions.exact_action: Record or communicate the documented status meaning based only on the observed stacklight pattern.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference image for the documented stacklight meanings when recording or communicating status.

stop_or_escalate_if: The observed pattern does not match one of the documented indications.
Additional corrective or recovery action is requested from this source section.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Solid Red: Default/Indeterminate. Solid Green: No AGV present at the station. Red, Yellow, Green: RMS error. Flashing Red: Fault. Flashing Yellow for 15 seconds: AGV is present at either position of the station.

source_evidence.note: Candidate extraction note: The source supports interpretation of stacklight states but does not provide corrective or recovery actions.

success_criteria: The hospital station stacklight is identified.
The observed indication is matched to one of the documented meanings.
The resulting status is recorded or communicated based only on the documented mapping.
healthy_conditions: The stacklight is visible and operational for observation.
The observed indication matches one of the documented patterns exactly.
Documented healthy/normal reference states include solid green for no AGV present at the station and flashing yellow for 15 seconds when an AGV is present at either position of the station.
failure_conditions: The stacklight cannot be located or clearly observed.
The observed pattern does not match one of the documented indications.
The user attempts to infer corrective or recovery actions from this source section.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the observed stacklight pattern does not match one of the documented indications.
Escalate if the stacklight cannot be clearly observed or identified.
Do not infer corrective actions from this source section because it provides status meanings only.

Documented stacklight color and flashing pattern meanings.

Solid Red: Default/Indeterminate. Solid Green: No AGV present at the station. Red, Yellow, Green: RMS error. Flashing Red: Fault. Flashing Yellow for 15 seconds: AGV is present at either position of the station.
